title: [Soup´s] Alternative Rounder Logs
description: (VANILLA ONLY) A round-ish log texture pack.
body:
A simple texturepack that edits the log tops of all wood types in minecraft (As of 1.21.11).

As of yet, **only compatible with vanilla** ´^`"
________________
Heavily inspired by https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/circular-logs , https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/even-better-logs , and VT's circular log tops.
